title: High Pass board and continuity phase
summary: Forty-fourth structured packet for Eco Explorer. This lane-1 wave makes the second season feel live by activating a compact High Pass route presence on the existing season board, then tightening continuity between the archived first season and the active second-season handoff.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the High Pass board activation handoff.
execution_order.why_now: The next season now opens, but the station still needs a stronger visible follow-through.

execution_order.goal: Implement the High Pass board activation.
execution_order.why_now: The season board should make High Pass feel live instead of merely implied.

execution_order.goal: Review the High Pass board activation.
execution_order.why_now: The board needs to stay calm and singular even as the next season becomes visible.

execution_order.goal: Prepare one continuity follow-on across archived and active season seams.
execution_order.why_now: The archived first season and active second season should feel continuous instead of stitched together.

execution_order.goal: Implement the archived-season and active-season continuity pass.
execution_order.why_now: Continuity across routes, expedition, and map cues will make the field station feel more intentional.
Season one and season two should now feel like one coherent adventure thread.

guardrails: Do not add a new station page.
Keep one clear active season path.
Reuse the current routes page, expedition page, and map seams.
acceptance_focus: High Pass feels live on the existing board.
The archived first season still reads clearly without feeling stale.
Lane 1 keeps progression warm and compact.
handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/lane-runner.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, .agents/lanes/lane-1.md, docs/reports/2026-03-31-high-pass-board-and-continuity-phase.md, and this packet. Treat this as lane 1's next systems wave: make High Pass feel live on the existing board, then tighten continuity between the archived first season and the active second-season handoff without adding a larger planner shell.
